positive: A stylized celestial forest scene, highly detailed silhouette design perfect for apparel printing. The composition features interlocking forms of bioluminescent, ancient trees forming a complex, radial mandala pattern around a central glowing geometric portal. Floating around the central portal are simplified, abstract representations of constellations and mythical lunar fauna (e.g., stylized celestial foxes, winged moth moths). Use a deep indigo and vibrant emerald green palette with sharp electric turquoise accents. The style must be graphic, modern Art Deco meets Japanese Ukiyo-e silhouette printing, utilizing crisp lines and high contrast. The scene should look excellent when printed on dark fabric, with all elements clearly defined and maintaining strong, graphic shapes. Vector art aesthetic, minimal gradients, high contrast.
negative: blur, low resolution, watermark, signature, messy, dirty, text, words, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, amateur, cartoonish, gradients, photographic, realism, logos, trademarks, characters
